channel.title: AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly
channel.description: Recent content on AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly

item.title: AI Detector Accuracy: How Accurate Are AI Detectors Really in 2026?
item.description: How accurate are AI detectors in 2026? We break down real AI detector accuracy, false positives, false negatives, and what you should actually trust.

item.title: AI Detector Rewrite Suggestions: How to Fix AI-Like Sentences Without Rewriting Everything
item.description: Need AI detector rewrite suggestions? Learn how to fix AI-like sentences, reduce false positives, and improve your text without rewriting everything from scratch.

item.title: Which Sentences Are AI-Written? How to Spot and Fix Them
item.description: Wondering which sentences are AI-written? Learn how to spot AI-like sentences, why detectors flag them, and how word-level highlighting helps you fix them.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Give False Positives — And How Word-Level Highlighting Fixes It
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI-generated all the time. Learn why false positives happen, why a percentage score isn't enough, and how word-level AI highlighting lets you see and fix the exact problem.

item.title: AI Detector False Positives — Why Human Writing Gets Flagged (And How to Fix It)
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI all the time. Learn why false positives happen, which tools are worst for them, and how to prove your text is human-written.

item.title: AI Detector with Rewrite Suggestions — Fix AI-Sounding Text Instantly
item.description: Detect AI-generated text and get instant rewrite suggestions for flagged sentences. The only free AI detector that tells you what to change and how to change it.

item.title: AI Detector Word Highlighting — See Exactly Which Words Are AI-Written
item.description: The only free AI detector that highlights individual words and phrases flagged as AI-generated. Not just a score — see the evidence at the word level.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Get False Positives — And What To Do About It
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI all the time. Here's why it happens, which writing styles are most at risk, and exactly how to fix a false positive result.

item.title: 5 Best Free AI Detectors (No Sign-Up Required)
item.description: Need to check if text is AI-generated without creating an account? These 5 tools are completely free and require no registration.

item.title: 7 Best AI Detector Tools in 2026 (Tested & Compared)
item.description: We tested 7 popular AI detector tools on the same texts. Here's what actually works — and what doesn't.

item.title: AI Content Detector — Check If Your Content Was AI-Generated
item.description: Free AI content detector for bloggers, editors, and SEO teams. Instantly check if content was written by AI. Supports ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.

item.title: AI Humanizer — Make AI Text Sound Human & Bypass AI Detection
item.description: Learn how to humanize AI-generated text so it reads naturally and passes AI detection tools. Tips, tools, and techniques for writers, students, and marketers.

item.title: AI Text Detector — Identify AI-Written Content in Seconds
item.description: Free AI text detector that identifies content written by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs. Paste text, get instant results. No signup needed.

item.title: ChatGPT Detector — Check If Text Was Written by ChatGPT
item.description: Use our free ChatGPT detector to find out if text was generated by ChatGPT (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4o). No signup. Instant results.

item.title: Free AI Checker — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly
item.description: Use our free AI checker to detect AI-generated content from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and more. No signup required. Accurate, fast, and free.

item.title: How to Detect AI-Generated Writing (7 Methods That Actually Work)
item.description: Learn how to spot AI-generated text using both tools and manual techniques. Includes free methods anyone can use right now.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Keep Getting It Wrong (And What That Means for You)
item.description: AI detectors flag innocent writers as AI, while missing actual AI content. Here's the science behind why, and what you should actually trust.
